title: Self Introduction
author: Harini
summary:
My name is Harini.And I'm from Chennai.I completed my Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Mookambigai College of Engineering,Pudukkottai.

Coming to my technical skills,I have got a good foundation in HTML,CSS and JavaScript.

I have done small projects like a youtube clone and a google login page using HTML,CSS and JavaScript,which helped me to improve my frontend development skills.

For my academic projects,I worked on "Secure medical data collaboration using Federated learning".In this project,we focused on protecting sensitive medical data while allowing multiple parties to collaborate securely.This helped me to understand both technical concepts and the importance of data security.

I am a quick learner,passionate about web development,and always interested in learning new technologies.I am looking for oppurtunities where I can improve my skills and contribute to real-world projects.
full_text:
My name is Harini.And I'm from Chennai.I completed my Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Mookambigai College of Engineering,Pudukkottai.

Coming to my technical skills,I have got a good foundation in HTML,CSS and JavaScript.

I have done small projects like a youtube clone and a google login page using HTML,CSS and JavaScript,which helped me to improve my frontend development skills.

For my academic projects,I worked on "Secure medical data collaboration using Federated learning".In this project,we focused on protecting sensitive medical data while allowing multiple parties to collaborate securely.This helped me to understand both technical concepts and the importance of data security.

I am a quick learner,passionate about web development,and always interested in learning new technologies.I am looking for oppurtunities where I can improve my skills and contribute to real-world projects.
